---
title: "project"
format: html
---
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
DonorHyperglycemia <- read_csv("DonorHyperglycemia.csv")
```


Log Regression Test with TWA and predictors gender, bmi, age:
```{r}
m1 <- glm(delayed_fn ~ glutwa + d_genderf + d_age,
          data = DonorHyperglycemia,
          family = "binomial") 

summary(m1)
```
```{r}
m2 <- glm(delayed_fn ~ glutwa + d_genderf + d_age + glutwa * d_age,
          data = DonorHyperglycemia,
          family = "binomial") 

summary(m2)
```

Does the relationship btw donor glucose and lgd depend on donor age
